forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 11pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and midnight, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 54. South southwest wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 4pm. Partly sunny. High near 75, with temperatures falling to around 72 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday Night
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy. Low around 58, with temperatures rising to around 61 overnight. South wind 10 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
